summary: Verified that testimonials 7–11 (Diego Morales, Sofía Ramírez, James O'Connor, Andrés Salazar, Lucas Tanaka) were already implemented in the prior commit (9dc94a1).

Ran npm install to restore node_modules, then executed all Phase 4 validation commands.
npm run build: passed with 0 errors — 7 pages built successfully.
npx astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings (only 11 pre-existing hints unrelated to this feature).
No new dependencies introduced. No regressions in testimonials 1–6.
